review_title: Well built all-in-one tool for running a photography business
description: I started out with just the Client Gallery Hosting version of Pixieset, but added the whole suite later as my business grew. I was swayed to the complete suite when they offered the Studio Manager feature, which allows you to schedule photography shoots and events.
author: Dan O.
pros: Pixieset's interface for managing its 5 applications is very well made and easy to use. It allows total control of the customization and upkeep of all aspects of your business from Client Gallery, Website, Store and Studio Manager.
cons: The larger Pixieset app packages for all applications can be a bit of an investment for photographers starting out. But the time you save by using Pixieset and its tools, can be applied to photoshoot and making money.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I’ve used pixieset for years and can’t be more pleased with all the features it’s offered and continues to add to. I’ve never had any issues and it’s affordability is an appreciated asset. I suggest this software to anyone in my business. As a technologically challenged individual, I assure you, you can’t go wrong.
cons: I really have no complaints other than the lack of mobile features and capabilities on the photographers side.

review_title: Fantastic service with one major flaw
description: A fantastic service that ultimately led me to feel like I was locked into their service due to the extremely inefficient ways of downloading your own pictures.
author: Taylor S.
pros: Very easy to use and constantly updating. I never felt the need to find a different hosting service. Galleries were always very professional looking with very little effort required. Their POD side of things weren't the greatest, and often way too expensive. Overall, I was very happy with the service they provided
cons: Migrating to a different platform was actually quite the pain. I don't backup my photography physically, I used Pixieset as my primary source of my photos as cloud hosting is significantly more reliable than hosting on a physical drive. This was great and all, but gallery organization was very average at best but that was even the major downfall. I made the switch to start using Amazon Photos as my cloud backup, and it is clear Pixieset wants to make bulk downloading a very difficult task. This was the last thing I expected and overall the reason I give them 3 stars. I felt very locked into the service with 10k+ pictures and 300-400 albums and galleries. When asking their support staff if they offered any bulk downloading solutions, they said they do not. Each of my galleries are locked by a PIN with the option to download entire galleries turn off... So I had to go into each gallery, one by one, turn off the PIN and allow gallery download, so that I can go in and view my own galleries like a client would and download all my galleries... A serious pain in the butt. Took Migrating to Amazon Photos took about 7 hours (not counting upload times). You can't even download entire galleries from the back-end. The only way to download your galleries is to do it just like your Client would... where you input your email, and they let you know when the gallery is ready to download. Insane for a photo service in 2024.

description: I have used Pixieset for almost 7 years. It has been my go-to for delivery of client images and I plan to use it for many more years to come. I know the images are safe on the pixieset cloud and easily accessible to clients.
author: Allison R.
pros: I love how professional pixieset looks and how easy it is for my clients to access their full resolution digital files. They can also order prints and download images. It's great for proofing and reviewing images as well.
cons: Sometimes clients have a difficult time downloading the images.

review_title: I Use Pixiest For My Website & Proofing
author: Carissa G.
pros: I absolutely love Pixieset! I couldn't beat the price and quality for bundling a website and a proofing system. The program automatically loads your watermark to all the photos you all you would need to worry about is uploading and sending. It's overall a simple program to use.
cons: The tutorials for submitting your images are outdated so I had to create my own as all of my customers struggle to understand it.

review_title: Best way to Deliver Photos in the 21st Century
description: I found it was easier than uploading to google drive and easier than I could have imagined delivering to the clients. It was easy to download and it even lets the customers choose .zip files when downloading. So, they don't have to go picture by picture.
author: Kevin A.
pros: I love that this software because I can deliver photos in the cleanest light. I found that my clients came back to me and said (why have we never done this before). The way we can upload the photos is to keep our branding make this look professional and stay within budget.
cons: The free version lets us hold up to 3000 photos, which is decent, but the pricing past the free version gets to be a little more expensive than I thought.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Rachel A.
pros: Pixieset has the most beautiful and easy website design. If you are wanting something you can throw together quickly but looks expensive, Pixieset is for you.
cons: Although I appreciate the effort being brought about by the studio management portion, it just isn't working for me.

review_title: One of the best one stop solutions on the market.
description: I've tried many "full service" client management systems that build portfolio management, website management, invoice and payment, etc., and for over 5 years, Pixieset has remained my first pick. I definitely appreciate them allowing me to remain on my legacy plan instead of forcing me to pick an alternative or raising my price to match the most similar plan they now offer to the one I currently have. My clients have never had any issues accessing their images. While there are a few features that could use some updates, they continue to strive to make improvements to becomes the only software you need from beginning to end.
author: Tiffany L.
pros: Pixieset has many features, and they are always adding more. They have added several features recently that were specifically requested by many users, which is a huge bonus when you feel like you're being heard by the company you're paying. Their website builder is very easy to use, and they've made considerable improvements with their client management system. They have great contract management, and highly user friendly invoice system. Pixieset also offers seamless integration with Stripe pay, allowing you to recieve payments directly through your invoice, which is very convenient. Using this platform to deliver digital products to clients is extremely simple, and has many tools to allow you and your client to communicate things about their products in a way that works best for you. You can utilize serval security measures for galleries as well. I also have a legacy plan (no longer available) and despite the many upgrades they've added since they discounted the specific plan I'm on, they've still allowed me to use all the features instead of "punishing" me for having locked in at a lower price.
cons: The storefront to turn digital products into physical prints still leaves much to be desired. It's tedious to set up, and requires some trial and error. Customizing emails is not currently available, so you're limited on how you can create emails for your clients. You can write whatever you want in the body of the email, and you can adjust the cover photo, and choose from 3 different "styles" - but nothing beyond that. The way clients download and then retrieve their images requires more steps for my clients than I would prefer - espeically on mobile devices, which is important in this day and age. They still have a long way to go with their booking features, and is definitely behind other similiar competitors on the market. The websites, while easy to build, are not ranked favorably with Google, and requires more effort with SEO and key work ranking than comparable options on the market. I also do not like that there is currently no feature for automated marketing emails, which is often a key feature for CRM.

description: I have used Pixieset to share files and create my website. My website is so clean and professional. I recommend this for small business owners and large business owners. It is amazing!
author: Joe G.
pros: It is so easy to use and you can share larger files.
cons: It can be a little more difficult to navigate for someone who isn't very tech-savvy

description: Overall I had a good experience for the amount of time I've used Pixieset. It was really easy to upload and deploy galleries, send to my clients and guests, I loved the gallery PIN option as well. Favoriting images was very easy both on my end and clients' end and it made my life easy when time came for me to design artwork for printing.
author: Laura G.
pros: I have used Pixieset for around 6 years. I used it for mainly gallery hosting, although I did have very few print and digital files sales through the system when they later implemented the Store option.
cons: I did try the website option as beta testing, but it was incredibly limited for me as a more seasoned photographer. For someone else who would be a beginner photographer, I would totally recommend it, as it is a nice and quick drag and drop option, but in the long run, you are stuck with something limiting, especially in terms of SEO and design. Now that they have purchased Flothemes, things may change for the better, so we will see where that goes.

description: It has really helped my business with elegant galleries.
author: Alvina M.
pros: My clients enjoy the ease and elegant look of Pixieset.
cons: Would like to edit and customize the sites more.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An unpleasant experience for the amount of money they are asking for!
description: An expensive interface, which I don't know if it's worth the money!
author: John P.
pros: It is easy to work in Pixieset. It has very intuitive buttons and offers great galleries
cons: The support is very weak, and the problems and bugs are countless. If you want to send the gallery to some clients, you often have to make sure it works. A whopping $35/month for something like this.

description: I have been very happy with it over the past 6 months of using it for my business.
author: Emma L.
pros: I love the customer support offered in Pixieset. Their editor is very easy to use and everything is tailored to photographers' needs which is nice compared to other similar software.
cons: Sometimes I wish I could customize more, but the ease of use makes it worth it to give up a little of that.

description: My experience with Pixies was amazing
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Pixiest is the perfect simple but the creatively open website/portfolio Creator for photographers etc. You can do so much with maximum simplicity.
cons: There isn't anything not to like, if your using it for what it is specified for, Photography Portfolio, you will not be disappointed.

review_title: Easy to use for photographers at a great price
description: Pixieset streamlines my workflow to easily send and proof client images.
author: Jonathan F.
pros: I have been using Pixiset since 2014. I love Pixieset because it allows my customers to easily download their ordered images both on a computer and on their mobile device. I also like how easy it is to have clients purchase prints directly through their gallery. I also love that PNG files are now supported. I also love how there are tiers for the subscriptions. I use the Pro 1,000 GB plan.
cons: I wish there was a way to make a gallery to be automatically "published" instead of always having to click "publish" after uploading the images to send to a client. I also would like to see more customization for how the images are displayed to the client. Maybe have it look more "corporate" in some cases. I do however wish the shopping cart would integrate with Square instead of Stripe

description: 2 out of 10, the service has really declined
author: Andre M.
pros: Nice looking templates, at fist glance, until
cons: I have been trying to get some simple help, and all anyone who respond, seem to only what to send you links.

description: Pixieset has taken our business to a professional level and gone some way in generating more business. It’s easy to use and plays a central role in our business.
author: Paul M.
pros: No matter how good your photos Pixieset makes them look sensational. My clients adore their albums this way. It’s also a fantastic way of sharing pix with family and friends using the link and password. Relatively easy to create the portfolio and can be done quickly. They also provide a free site builder which looks great.
cons: I do believe it’s a little pricey despite being a huge fan. To be honest that’s all I dislike

author: Rayvon G.
pros: I love the fact the expiration feature and scheduled emails. The password protection and custom folders for individual user experience.
cons: I wish they allowed scheduling for emails and alot of my clients struggle trying to get back into their favorites folder to make changes. I also wish their were more options to customize the client folder.

review_title: Already good but could be great
description: Overall it’s good and it’s my main website for my business. It could use some improvements and move a little faster to be up to speed with similar services from other companies.
author: Ansley S.
pros: It’s easy to use and has great options for customizing the look of your site. It’s also simple for customers to navigate on their side. One other great feature is being able to set custom price sheets for different types of photo sessions.
cons: They’re expanding the CRM side but a scheduling feature would be great to have. It seems like they are slow to add features that would make it all-inclusive. There is also no phone contact for support and it all has to go through email. While I understand that more features cost money, but I feel like they nickel-and-done for everything, including using your own domain.

description: I love that I can upload my files and have templates to send to my clients for them to download. I can keep up the galleries for portfolio work as well.
author: Holly C.
pros: I love that my galleries look seamless for delivery to clients and that the storefront to purchase prints is built in
cons: The size cap for the space is a bit low, it's more cost effective to pay for a year than month by month

review_title: A melhor alternativa pra entregar fotos online
description: É uma ferramenta muito útil pra entregar fotos digitais aos clientes. A apresentação da galeria fica bonita, enaltecendo melhor as fotos a serem vistas pelos clientes. Além disso, é muito fácil de baixar as fotos no celular ou computador.
author: Valéria D.
pros: O design das galerias é bonito, tem diversas opções de temas e é realmente fácil de usar.
cons: O valor da assinatura do serviço é um pouco alto.

description: It is has been good no issues.
author: Rebecca H.
pros: This was easy to set up and use. I use this for my virtual photo-reveals for rating photos and sharing download galleries.
cons: It could not upload videos but that has not been an enhancement.

review_title: Crazy commission charges on FREE account
description: It doesn't make sense to charge commission that totals to almost the same amount as a full account and then on top of this deliver reduced quality images because it is a free account.
author: Elle D.
pros: It was easy to use and did enjoy using Pixieset while I had the PAID plan.
cons: During the pandemic I did not get photography work so I cancelled my Pixieset account. I just started slowly getting clients again, so I contacted Pixieset and asked them to reinstate my account but this time, I just wanted a FREE account until my business picks up again. I know and accepted the term that there will be commission charges - but, I work with mini sessions and I included 30 digital images in my package for my client, provided her with a coupon code and when she checked out with this coupon code, I got charged $45 (because i marked the images as $10 each - but the client did not pay this to me as these images were included in her package) - which is ridiculous as this is just $3 short of an entire full account. And that being said, the client then download these images at a reduced quality because this is a FREE account.

author: Justice D.
pros: I love that the site is very user-friendly and customizable in order to make each clients gallery unique
cons: I wish there was just more space that could be available for free, I find myself constantly deleting galleries to free up storage space

author: Tracy D.
pros: I like the functions it offers for customer gallery viewing
cons: Difficult for users not on a computer to download media
